name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select execution date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state of execution

name: property_type
label: Property Type
hint: Select property type

name: property_description
label: Property Description
hint: Enter full description of the property

name: property_address
label: Property Address
hint: Enter full property address

name: survey_number
label: Survey / Plot Number
hint: Enter survey or plot number

name: area_details
label: Area Details
hint: Enter built-up, carpet, super built-up, or land area

name: north_boundary
label: North Boundary
hint: Enter what lies on the north side of the property

name: south_boundary
label: South Boundary
hint: Enter what lies on the south side of the property

name: east_boundary
label: East Boundary
hint: Enter what lies on the east side of the property

name: west_boundary
label: West Boundary
hint: Enter what lies on the west side of the property

name: flat_floor_number
label: Floor Number
hint: Enter floor number for flat property

name: flat_wing_number
label: Wing / Block Number
hint: Enter wing or block number for flat property

name: parking_included
label: Parking Included
hint: Tick if a parking space is included in the sale

name: parking_details
label: Parking Details
hint: Enter parking slot number, type, and location

name: title_details
label: Title Details
hint: Explain ownership history and chain of title

name: encumbrance_status
label: Encumbrance Status
hint: Select encumbrance status

name: encumbrance_loan_details
label: Loan / Charge Details
hint: Enter lender name, outstanding dues, and release details

name: encumbrance_dispute_details
label: Dispute Details
hint: Describe the pending dispute, claim, or litigation

name: ec_verified_from_date
label: EC Verified From Date
hint: Select start date of encumbrance certificate verification

name: ec_verified_to_date
label: EC Verified To Date
hint: Select end date of encumbrance certificate verification

name: sale_consideration
label: Total Sale Consideration
hint: Enter total sale amount

name: guideline_value
label: Guideline Value / Circle Rate
hint: Enter government guideline value or circle rate

fields.name: transaction_details
fields.label: Transaction Details
fields.hint: Enter cheque number, DD number, or UTR number

name: advance_paid
label: Advance Paid
hint: Enter advance amount

name: balance_payment_due
label: Balance Payment
hint: Enter remaining amount

name: tds_applicable
label: TDS Applicable
hint: Tick if TDS under Section 194-IA is applicable

name: tds_challan_number
label: TDS Challan Number
hint: Enter TDS challan or Form 26QB reference number

name: possession_date
label: Possession Date
hint: Select possession handover date

name: possession_clause
label: Possession Clause
hint: Describe possession transfer terms

name: indemnity_clause
label: Indemnity Clause
hint: Seller indemnifies buyer against title defects and claims

name: default_clause
label: Default Clause
hint: Enter consequences for breach or non-payment

name: seller_signing_through_poa
label: Seller Signing Through Power of Attorney
hint: Tick if a power of attorney holder is executing the deed

name: poa_holder_name
label: POA Holder Name
hint: Enter power of attorney holder full name

name: poa_holder_address
label: POA Holder Address
hint: Enter address of power of attorney holder

name: poa_holder_id_proof
label: POA Holder ID Proof
hint: Enter Aadhaar, PAN, or other ID proof

name: registered_poa_number
label: Registered POA Number
hint: Enter registered power of attorney number

name: registered_poa_date
label: Registered POA Date
hint: Select date of registered power of attorney

name: minor_interest_in_property
label: Minor Has Interest in Property
hint: Tick if a minor is a co-owner or otherwise has interest in the property

name: court_permission_details
label: Court Permission Details
hint: Enter guardian and court permission details for the minor's interest

fields.name: document_name
fields.label: Document Name
fields.hint: Enter document name, e.g. parent deed or tax receipt

fields.name: document_details
fields.label: Document Details
fields.hint: Enter date, number, or short description

name: registration_details
label: Registration Details
hint: Enter Sub-Registrar office and registration details

name: stamp_duty
label: Stamp Duty Amount
hint: Enter stamp duty paid

name: registration_fee
label: Registration Fee
hint: Enter registration fee

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction
